---
title: "Module 7"
subtitle: "Joining data & communicating results with Quarto"
editor: source
params:
    module: 7
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
---


## {{< fa bullseye >}} Learning Objectives

```{r}

lobj1 <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data/tbl-02-learning-objectives.csv")) |> 
  dplyr::filter(module == params$module) |>
  dplyr::pull(learning_objectives)

```

1. `r lobj1[1]`
2. `r lobj1[2]`
3. `r lobj1[3]`
4. `r lobj1[4]`

## {{< fa display >}} Slides

[View slides in full screen](../slides/lec-05-communicate.html) | [Download slides as PDF]({{< var course.github-org >}}/website/raw/main/slides/lec-05-communicate.pdf)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="../slides/lec-05-communicate.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #123233;"></iframe>
```

## {{< fa book >}} Readings

1. Read [R for Data Science - Section 13 - Relational data](https://r4ds.had.co.nz/relational-data.html)

## {{< fa code >}} Homework assignment 

Homework assignment & learning reflection due: [**{{< var md-07.homework-due >}}**]{.highlight-yellow}

Complete the homework programming assignments that are in your folder for Module 7 on [Posit Cloud]({{< var platforms.posit-cloud >}}content/all):

You will need to clone your `md-07-USERNAME` folder to Posit Cloud first and then complete:

- hw-01-data-import-exploration.qmd
- hw-02-filter-join.qmd
- hw-03-data-analysis.qmd
- hw-04-data-visualization-pivoting.qmd
 
## {{< fa pen-clip >}} Learning reflection

Complete the learning reflection that is in your folder for Module 7 by [**{{< var md-07.homework-due >}}**]{.highlight-yellow} on [Posit Cloud]({{< var platforms.posit-cloud >}}content/all)

- learning-07.qmd
